narrative:
Springboro City 4-C (precinct in Warren County) has 448 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
